description_long: This is a two-story yellow house with a prominent hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The structure features a large covered porch supported by columns at the front, leading to a main entryway with steps. The exterior walls are painted yellow with white trim, and there are multiple rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically around the building. A garage is integrated into the left side of the house, and there is a secondary covered area on the right, possibly a patio or veranda. The house sits on a stone or concrete foundation, with paved walkways and a driveway visible around the perimeter.
description: A two-story yellow house with a red-tiled hip roof, covered porch, garage, and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large blank wall, upper balcony, and secondary covered area on the right.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the porch, additional windows, and the roof's complex geometry.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear facade, more windows, and the full expanse of the hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, columns, and a prominent overhang at the main door.
